id.description: The ID of the Instructor as an integer.

user_id.description: The ID of the User owning the Instructor

first_name.description: The first name of the Instructor.

last_name.description: The last name of the Instructor.

bio.example: Bob Jones is an instructor of note.

slug.description: The slug of the Instructor NOTE: This will be removed in future API versions

avatar_url.description: The fully-qualified url of the Instructor's avatar

created_at.description: The date/time that the Instructor was created.
